meta.title: Bowen Bakery — Bowen Island, BC
meta.description: Family-owned bakery on Bowen Island. Sourdough, pastries, and coffee, baked fresh daily since 1994.

data.headline: Sourdough, pastries, and coffee — baked fresh, every morning.
data.subhead: A family bakery in Snug Cove. We mill our own flour, take our time, and we'd love to see you.

image.alt: Bowen Bakery sourdough loaves cooling on a rack

items.title: Sourdough Loaves
items.description: Country whites, dark ryes, seeded multigrains — all naturally leavened, baked daily.

items.title: Morning Pastries
items.description: Croissants, almond bear claws, kouign-amann. Laminated by hand, butter from a Fraser Valley farm.

items.title: Coffee & Espresso
items.description: Beans roasted weekly in East Van. Pour-overs, espresso drinks, drip — and a great oat milk.

text.headline: Three generations on a small island.
text.body: Margaret started this bakery in '94 with one oven and a sourdough starter she's been keeping alive for forty-one years. Today her son James and granddaughter Hana run the bakery, but the starter is the same.

items.author: Linda M.
items.text: Our weekend morning ritual. The sourdough is the best on the coast — full stop.

items.author: Tomás R.
items.text: We took the ferry over just for breakfast. Worth every minute. The almond croissants are unreal.

items.author: Elena K.
items.text: Hana remembers your order. The coffee is excellent. The vibe is everything you'd hope a small island bakery would be.

data.headline: Order ahead for weekend pickup.
data.subhead: Call by Friday — we save loaves for regulars who plan ahead.

data.headline: We're a five-minute walk from the Snug Cove ferry.
